2015-T4-P3-S1.trunk: S+V：the wider issue of dearth of integrity still stands（诚信匮乏这一更广的问题依然存在）
structure: 时间状语从句(As)：As the hacking trial concludes
└ 破折号插入（现在分词作伴随，说明庭审结果）：finding guilty one ex-editor …, and finding his predecessor … innocent of the same charge
└ find + 宾 + 宾补（并列）：finding [one ex-editor] guilty / finding [his predecessor] innocent
主句：the wider issue of dearth of integrity still stands
（后续独立句）：Journalists are known to have hacked the phones of up to 5,500 people
2015-T4-P3-S1.logic: As 引导时间状语从句（随着…落幕）；破折号夹的 finding… 现在分词作伴随状语（裁定…有罪、…无罪）；主句 the wider issue still stands；末句独立。
notes: 破折号夹的 finding … guilty … and finding … innocent 是现在分词作伴随状语（find + 宾语 + 宾补）。
As the hacking trial concludes：As 引导时间状语从句（随着庭审落幕）。
本条含两句；dearth of integrity 诚信匮乏；be known to have done 据悉曾…。

2015-T4-P2-S1.trunk: 现在分词状语+主句：Driving her point home, she continued: 「…」（为强调其观点，她接着说：「…」）
structure: 现在分词作状语：Driving her point home
引语（形式主语 it）：It's increasingly apparent that the absence of purpose … could become one of the most dangerous goals for capitalism and freedom
├ 主语从句(that)：that the absence of purpose … could become …
└ of… 并列补充〔说明 the absence〕：of a moral language within government, media or business
2015-T4-P2-S1.logic: Driving her point home 现在分词作状语（强调观点）；主句 she continued；引语 it 形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句；of a moral language… 补充说明 the absence。
notes: Driving her point home：现在分词短语作状语（drive one's point home 把观点讲透/强调）。
It's apparent that…：it 形式主语，真正主语是 that 从句。
the absence of purpose, of a moral language…：of… 并列补充（缺乏宗旨、缺乏道德话语）。

2015-T4-P2-S2.trunk: S+V+O：This same absence of moral purpose was wounding companies …（这种道德目的的缺失正在损害…等公司）
structure: 主句：This same absence of moral purpose was wounding companies such as News International
现在分词作结果状语：making it more likely that it would lose its way …
├ make it（形式宾语）+ more likely + that 从句（真正宾语）：that it would lose its way
└ 方式状语从句(as)：as it had with widespread illegal telephone hacking
2015-T4-P2-S2.logic: 主句 the absence was wounding companies（she thought 插入）；making… 现在分词作结果状语（make it + 形容词 + that 从句，it 形式宾语）；as it had… 方式状语（如同它曾…）。
notes: making it more likely that…：现在分词作结果状语；make it（形式宾语）+ more likely + that 从句（真正宾语）。
as it had (done) with…：as 引导方式状语从句（如同它在…中曾经那样）；lose one's way 迷失方向。
